label: qr-cdn-fix-theme-picker-breakpoint
topWin: Root-caused theme picker invisibility to a CSS @media (max-width: 980px) rule hiding the picker at any viewport width ≤980px — a common laptop window width — and moved the hide rule to 640px (phones only)
topGap: SIL velocity 0; session was reactive bug-fix only; no proactive SIL items from board completed

ui: tileColor field added to THEMES array for more distinct tile backgrounds

ignisNote: Theme picker breakpoint bug was silently hiding the tile grid for any user with a browser window narrower than 980px — which includes most laptop users who don't run maximized. The @media (max-width: 980px) block was intended for tablet-collapsed nav, not theme picker visibility. Moved to 640px. QR code CDN 404 was a jsDelivr package path issue: @1.5.3 has no build/ directory on the CDN; @1.5.0 does.
